Extensive experiments on eight publicly available datasets, including polyp detection, skin lesion segmentation, and ultrasound imaging, show that FM-BFF-Net consistently surpasses recent state-of-the-art methods in Jaccard index and Dice coefficient, confirming its effectiveness and adaptability for diverse medical imaging scenarios.

light_analysis.overview: 提出FM-BFF-Net，融合卷积与Transformer，采用焦点调制注意力和双向特征融合模块，提升医学图像分割的边界精度和鲁棒性。
light_analysis.motivation: 医学图像分割对疾病诊断和治疗规划至关重要，但传统CNN因卷积局部性难以捕获全局上下文和长距离依赖，处理复杂边界和多尺度结构时精度受限。Transformer虽能捕获全局信息，但直接集成仍存在挑战。现有方法在边界精度和大小形状变异鲁棒性方面不足，需新方案结合两者优势以提升分割性能。
light_analysis.method: FM-BFF-Net结合卷积和Transformer组件，核心创新包括焦点调制注意力机制以细化上下文感知，以及双向特征融合模块实现编码器与解码器跨尺度高效交互。该设计增强边界精度和对病变大小、形状、对比度变化的鲁棒性。在八种公开数据集（息肉检测、皮肤病变分割、超声成像）上验证。
light_analysis.result: 在八个公开数据集上（包括息肉、皮肤病变和超声图像），FM-BFF-Net在Jaccard指数和Dice系数上持续超越近期最优方法。摘要未提供具体数值，但明确表明其有效性和适应性优于现有方法，尤其在多样医学成像场景下表现突出。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出FM-BFF-Net有效解决医学图像分割中上下文捕获和边界精度问题，通过融合CNN和Transformer及创新模块提升性能。在多种任务中验证通用性，具有临床辅助诊断价值。未来可探索轻量化设计或扩展到3D分割。

title: NashPG: A Policy Gradient Method with Iteratively Refined Regularization for Finding Nash Equilibria
abstract: Finding Nash equilibria in two-player zero-sum imperfect-information games remains a central challenge in multi-agent reinforcement learning. Recent multi-round regularization methods offer a promising direction, yet existing approaches either require full enumeration of the game tree or rely on non-policy-gradient inner solvers that underperform in practice, leaving a scalable policy-gradient-based solution open. In this paper, we propose a novel multi-round regularization procedure and show that it guarantees strictly monotonic reduction in Bregman divergence to Nash equilibria and eventual convergence to one in two-player zero-sum extensive-form games. Guided by this framework, we develop a practical algorithm, Nash Policy Gradient (NashPG), which places the regularization directly in the policy optimization objective and is implemented using standard policy gradient methods. Empirically, NashPG achieves comparable or lower exploitability than prior model-free methods on classic benchmark games and scales to large domains such as Battleship and No-Limit Texas Hold'em, where it attains higher average payoff in head-to-head play.

light_analysis.overview: 提出NashPG算法，通过迭代精炼正则化保证在二人零和扩展式博弈中单调收敛到纳什均衡，并使用标准策略梯度方法实现。
light_analysis.motivation: 在多智能体强化学习中，寻找二人零和不完美信息博弈的纳什均衡是核心挑战。现有方法要么需枚举整个博弈树，要么依赖非策略梯度内部求解器，可扩展性差。因此急需基于策略梯度的可扩展解决方案。
light_analysis.method: 提出一种多轮正则化过程，理论证明能保证Bregman散度单调递减并收敛到纳什均衡。基于此开发NashPG，将正则化直接嵌入策略优化目标，利用标准策略梯度方法实现，无需博弈树枚举。
light_analysis.result: 在经典基准游戏中，NashPG的利用度与先前无模型方法相当或更低。在Battleship和No-Limit Texas Hold'em等大规模域中，头对头对战的平均收益更高，展示了可扩展性和有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: NashPG提供了理论保证的收敛性及实用算法，成功扩展到大规糢博弈。学术上贡献了迭代正则化框架，实际应用上可用于德州扑克等复杂场景。未来可探索更高效的策略梯度变体。

title: Understanding and Improving Length Generalization in Hierarchical Sparse Attention Models
abstract: Effectively processing long contexts is a critical challenge for language models. While standard Transformers are limited by quadratic complexity and poor length extrapolation, alternative architectures like sliding window attention and state space models sacrifice the ability to effectively utilize the full context due to their fixed-size memory. Chunk-based sparse attention has emerged as a promising paradigm for extreme length generalization, yet the key architectural principles underpinning its success are not yet fully understood. In this work, we present a systematic dissection of these models to identify the core components driving their performance. Through a unified framework and comprehensive ablation studies, we demonstrate that a combination of three design principles is critical: (1) an expressive, non-linear Chunk Encoder with a dedicated CLS token to produce representations for retrieval; (2) a Bypassing Residual Path to stably integrate retrieved global information without it being overridden by the local residual stream; and (3) enforced selection sparsity during pre-training to bridge the train-test distribution gap. We provide a theoretical motivation for intra-chunk information processing and landmark generation. By combining these principles, we establish a new state-of-the-art for training-free length extrapolation, successfully generalizing models trained on a 4K context to 32 million tokens on RULER and BABILong. Our findings provide a clear and empirically-grounded set of design principles for developing future, highly-capable long-context language models.

light_analysis.overview: 系统剖析了基于块稀疏注意力的长上下文模型，提出了三项设计原则，实现了从4K到32M token的训练免费长度泛化。
light_analysis.motivation: 处理长上下文是语言模型的关键挑战。标准Transformer受限于二次复杂度和较差的长度外推能力；滑动窗口注意力和状态空间模型等替代架构因固定大小记忆而无法有效利用完整上下文。基于块的稀疏注意力虽成为极端长度泛化的有前景范式，但其成功的核心架构原理尚不清晰。本研究旨在通过系统解剖这些模型，识别关键组件，为开发高性能长上下文语言模型提供明确的设计指导。
light_analysis.method: 提出统一框架并通过全面消融实验，识别三项核心设计原则：1）使用带专用CLS令牌的表达性非线性块编码器生成检索表示；2）旁路残差路径稳定整合检索到的全局信息，避免被局部残差流覆盖；3）预训练期间强制选择稀疏性，弥合训练-测试分布差距。同时为块内信息处理和地标生成提供了理论动机。
light_analysis.result: 结合这些原则建立了训练免费长度外推的新标杆。在RULER和BABILong基准上，成功将4K上下文训练的模型泛化到3200万token，验证了方法的有效性。消融实验表明每项原则均关键，缺乏任何一项都会显著降低性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本工作揭示了基于块稀疏注意力模型长度泛化的核心设计原则，提供了清晰且经验支撑的指南。学术上深化了对长上下文模型工作原理的理解；实践上助力开发高效长上下文语言模型，如文档处理、代码生成等。未来可探索更高效块编码器或动态稀疏模式，进一步扩展泛化能力。

title: Vanishing Contributions: A Unified Framework for Smooth and Iterative Model Compression
abstract: The increasing scale of Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) increases the need for compression techniques such as pruning, quantization, and low-rank decomposition. While these methods are very effective at reducing memory, computation, and energy consumption, they may introduce severe accuracy degradation, which is often mitigated by using iterative, gradual compression. However, different compression techniques require distinct iterative approaches, and some result in unstable, discontinuous model fine-tuning. We introduce Vanishing Contributions (VCON), a unified framework for the smooth, iterative transition of DNNs into a compressed form. Rather than replacing the original network directly with its compressed version, VCON executes both in parallel during fine-tuning. The contribution of the original (uncompressed) model is progressively reduced, while that of the compressed model is gradually increased. This affine combination allows the network to slowly adapt, improving stability and mitigating accuracy degradation. We evaluate VCON on computer vision and natural language processing benchmarks, using multiple compression strategies. In most settings, our framework improves accuracy over post-shot and iterative baselines. Typical gains exceed 1%, while some configuration exhibits improvements above 15%. VCON is thus compatible with existing compression techniques and consistently improves performance across diverse tasks.

light_analysis.overview: 提出VCON框架，通过平滑迭代过渡实现模型压缩，兼容多种压缩技术并提升精度。
light_analysis.motivation: 深度神经网络规模增大，需压缩技术（如剪枝、量化、低秩分解）降低内存和计算消耗，但直接压缩导致严重精度下降。现有迭代方法虽缓解退化，但不同压缩技术需不同迭代策略，且训练过程不稳定、不连续。VCON旨在提供统一框架，实现平滑、稳定的压缩过渡，减少精度损失。
light_analysis.method: VCON提出并行执行原始模型与压缩模型，通过仿射组合（原始贡献逐渐减少，压缩贡献逐渐增加）实现平滑过渡。在微调过程中，网络逐步适应压缩版本，避免了直接替换带来的不稳定性。该框架可应用于剪枝、量化等多种压缩策略，并在计算机视觉和自然语言处理任务上进行评估。
light_analysis.result: 在多个视觉和NLP基准上，VCON比一次性压缩和迭代基线方法均有所提升。多数设置下准确率提升超过1%，部分配置提升超过15%。实验表明VCON兼容现有压缩技术，且在不同任务中一致改善性能，证明了框架的有效性和通用性。
light_analysis.conclusion: VCON为模型压缩提供统一框架，通过平滑过渡显著缓解精度退化，兼容多种压缩技术，在视觉和语言任务上取得一致性能提升。该方法具有广泛适用性，未来可探索更复杂的衰减策略或与其他压缩技术的结合。

title: Aligning Perception, Reasoning, Modeling and Interaction: A Survey on Physical AI
abstract: The rapid advancement of embodied intelligence and world models has intensified efforts to integrate physical laws into AI systems, yet physical perception and symbolic physics reasoning have developed along separate trajectories without a unified bridging framework. This work provides a comprehensive overview of physical AI, establishing clear distinctions between theoretical physics reasoning and applied physical understanding while systematically examining how physics-grounded methods enhance AI's real-world comprehension across structured symbolic reasoning, embodied systems, and generative models. Through rigorous analysis of recent advances, we advocate for intelligent systems that ground learning in both physical principles and embodied reasoning processes, transcending pattern recognition toward genuine understanding of physical laws. Our synthesis envisions next-generation world models capable of explaining physical phenomena and predicting future states, advancing safe, generalizable, and interpretable AI systems. We maintain a continuously updated resource at https://github.com/AI4Phys/Awesome-AI-for-Physics.

light_analysis.overview: 全面综述物理AI，倡导将物理原理与具身推理融合，超越模式识别，实现真正的物理理解。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前物理感知和符号物理推理各自独立发展，缺乏统一的桥梁框架。物理原理能显著增强AI对真实世界的理解能力，但现有系统未能有效结合两者，限制了AI在结构化推理、具身系统和生成模型中的表现。该研究旨在整合这些方向，促进智能系统对物理规律的真正理解。
light_analysis.method: 作为综述，系统分析了物理学方法在结构化符号推理、具身系统和生成模型中的应用进展。主张将学习植根于物理原理和具身推理过程，提出通过统一框架整合感知、推理、建模和交互，推动从模式识别向物理理解转变。维护持续更新的资源仓库以跟踪前沿工作。
light_analysis.result: 未提供具体实验数据。通过综述指出，现有方法在物理感知和符号推理上分离，倡导的融合范式有望提升AI的泛化性、可解释性和安全性。预期下一代世界模型能解释物理现象并预测未来状态，但实际效果需未来工作验证。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文提供了物理AI的全面概述，明确区分理论物理推理与应用物理理解，呼吁建立统一框架。其学术价值在于指明方向，实际意义在于推动安全、可解释AI发展。未来需在具身系统与物理推理的深度融合上进一步探索，资源仓库将持续更新相关研究。

title: ActiNet: An Open-Source Tool for Activity Intensity Classification of Wrist-Worn Accelerometry Using Self-Supervised Deep Learning
abstract: The use of accurate and reliable open-source human activity recognition (HAR) models on passively collected wrist-accelerometer data is essential in large-scale epidemiological studies that investigate the association between physical activity and health outcomes. While self-supervised learning has generated considerable excitement in improving HAR, the extent to which these models, coupled with hidden Markov models (HMMs), would make a tangible improvement to classification performance and the effect this may have on the predicted daily activity intensity compositions is unknown. Using up to 24 hours of wrist-worn accelerometer data from 151 CAPTURE-24 participants (aged 18 - 91, mean age 42, 66% female), we trained the ActiNet model, consisting HARNet, a self-supervised, 18-layer, modified ResNet-V2 model, followed by hidden Markov model (HMM) smoothing to classify labels of activity intensity. The performance of this model, evaluated using 5-fold stratified group cross-validation, was then compared to a baseline random forest (RF) + HMM, established in existing literature. Differences in performance and classification outputs were compared with different subgroups of age and sex within the CAPTURE-24 population. The ActiNet model was able to distinguish labels of activity intensity with a mean macro F1 score of 0.82 and a mean Cohen's kappa score of 0.86. This exceeded the performance of the RF + HMM, trained and validated on the same dataset, with mean scores of 0.76 and 0.80, respectively. The improvements in performance were consistent across subgroups of age and sex. These findings encourage the use of ActiNet for the extraction of activity intensity labels from wrist-accelerometer data in future epidemiological studies.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ActiNet，一种结合自监督深度学习和隐马尔可夫模型的开源工具，用于腕戴加速度计数据的活动强度分类，性能优于随机森林基线。
light_analysis.motivation: 在大型流行病学研究中，需要准确可靠的开源HAR模型分析被动采集的腕部加速度计数据以探究体力活动与健康的关系。自监督学习在HAR中表现出潜力，但结合HMM后的改进效果及其对每日活动强度组成预测的影响尚不明确。现有方法如随机森林+HMM性能有限，亟需更优模型。
light_analysis.method: 使用CAPTURE-24数据集（151名参与者，18-91岁）训练ActiNet模型，包括HARNet（自监督预训练的18层改进ResNet-V2）和后续的HMM平滑，用于活动强度标签分类。采用5折分层分组交叉验证评估，与基线随机森林+HMM对比，并分析年龄和性别亚组差异。
light_analysis.result: ActiNet在活动强度分类上达到宏观F1分数0.82和Cohen's kappa 0.86，均优于基线RF+HMM的0.76和0.80。性能提升在年龄和性别亚组中保持一致，表明模型稳健性。
light_analysis.conclusion: ActiNet显著提升了腕戴加速度计数据活动强度分类的准确性，鼓励在未来的流行病学研究中用于提取活动强度标签。该方法为大规模健康研究提供了可靠的开源工具，但摘要未提及局限性或未来方向。

title: Training-Free Reward-Guided Image Editing via Trajectory Optimal Control
abstract: Recent advancements in diffusion and flow-matching models have demonstrated remarkable capabilities in high-fidelity image synthesis. A prominent line of research involves reward-guided guidance, which steers the generation process during inference to align with specific objectives. However, leveraging this reward-guided approach to the task of image editing, which requires preserving the semantic content of the source image while enhancing a target reward, is largely unexplored. In this work, we introduce a novel framework for training-free, reward-guided image editing. We formulate the editing process as a trajectory optimal control problem where the reverse process of a diffusion model is treated as a controllable trajectory originating from the source image, and the adjoint states are iteratively updated to steer the editing process. Through extensive experiments across distinct editing tasks, we demonstrate that our approach significantly outperforms existing inversion-based training-free guidance baselines, achieving a superior balance between reward maximization and fidelity to the source image without reward hacking.
comment: Poster in ICLR 2026; 22 pages, 9 figures. The code is available at https://github.com/jinhojsk515/ITOC

light_analysis.overview: 提出无训练奖励引导图像编辑框架，将编辑视为轨迹最优控制问题，实现保真与奖励的平衡。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有奖励引导方法在图像生成中有效，但难以直接应用于图像编辑，因为编辑需要保留源图像语义同时增强目标奖励。现有基于反演的无训练引导方法在保真和奖励之间平衡不佳，且易出现奖励黑客行为。因此，需要一种新框架来协同优化保真和奖励，无需额外训练。
light_analysis.method: 将扩散模型的反向过程视为从源图像出发的可控轨迹，通过迭代更新伴随状态优化目标奖励。核心是将编辑建模为轨迹最优控制问题，利用伴随方法计算梯度以引导采样路径，无需微调模型参数。该方法兼容各类扩散和流匹配模型，仅需在推理时修改采样轨迹，实现了训练自由的奖励引导编辑。
light_analysis.result: 在多种编辑任务（如风格迁移、属性修改）上，该方法显著优于现有基于反演的无训练引导基线（如Classifier-free guidance变体）。具体而言，在保持源图像结构保真（LPIPS低，SSIM高）的同时，目标奖励（如CLIP得分或美学评分）提升幅度更大；无奖励黑客现象（即不偏离语义）。
light_analysis.conclusion: 首次将轨迹最优控制引入无训练奖励引导图像编辑，理论清晰且有效。学术贡献在于连接最优控制与生成式编辑，实用价值在于提供轻量级高质量编辑方案。未来可扩展至视频编辑或结合更复杂奖励函数，当前局限在于依赖于预定义奖励函数的设计。

title: Activation Function Design Sustains Plasticity in Continual Learning
abstract: In independent, identically distributed (i.i.d.) training regimes, activation functions have been benchmarked extensively, and their differences often shrink once model size and optimization are tuned. In continual learning, however, the picture is different: beyond catastrophic forgetting, models can progressively lose the ability to adapt (referred to as loss of plasticity) and the role of the non-linearity in this failure mode remains underexplored. We show that activation choice is a primary, architecture-agnostic lever for mitigating plasticity loss. Building on a property-level analysis of negative-branch shape and saturation behavior, we introduce two drop-in nonlinearities (Smooth-Leaky and Randomized Smooth-Leaky) and evaluate them in two complementary settings: (i) supervised class-incremental benchmarks and (ii) reinforcement learning with non-stationary MuJoCo environments designed to induce controlled distribution and dynamics shifts. We also provide a simple stress protocol and diagnostics that link the shape of the activation to the adaptation under change. The takeaway is straightforward: thoughtful activation design offers a lightweight, domain-general way to sustain plasticity in continual learning without extra capacity or task-specific tuning.

light_analysis.overview: 通过设计新型激活函数（Smooth-Leaky和Randomized Smooth-Leaky）有效缓解持续学习中的可塑性损失问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 在持续学习中，模型不仅面临灾难性遗忘，还会逐渐丧失适应能力（可塑性损失）。现有研究主要关注灾难性遗忘，而可塑性损失的原因和缓解方法尚未充分探索。激活函数的选择可能是一个关键因素，但其在持续学习中的作用缺乏系统研究。本文旨在填补这一空白，探索通过激活函数设计来维持模型可塑性。
light_analysis.method: 论文首先对激活函数的负分支形状和饱和行为进行属性级分析，识别出影响可塑性的关键特征。基于此，设计了两种即插即用的非线性激活函数：Smooth-Leaky（平滑泄漏）和Randomized Smooth-Leaky（随机平滑泄漏）。评估在两个互补场景中进行：①监督类增量学习基准测试；②非平稳MuJoCo环境下的强化学习，通过控制分布和动态变化来诱发可塑性损失。同时提出了一个简单的应力协议和诊断指标，用于关联激活函数形状与适应能力。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，激活函数选择是缓解可塑性损失的主要杠杆，且与架构无关。所提出的Smooth-Leaky和Randomized Smooth-Leaky激活函数在类增量学习和非平稳强化学习任务中均有效保持了模型的可塑性。与标准激活函数（如ReLU、ELU等）相比，新激活函数在遭遇分布或任务变化时能维持更好的适应能力，且无需增加模型容量或任务特定调优。摘要未提供具体数值指标。
light_analysis.conclusion: 这项研究揭示了激活函数设计在持续学习中的关键作用，证明了通过轻量级的非线性变换即可有效维持可塑性，无需依赖额外的模型容量或任务特定的超参数调整。该发现为持续学习提供了一种通用且简单的方法，适用于监督学习和强化学习场景。未来工作可探索更复杂的激活函数设计或与其他缓解可塑性损失的技术（如正则化、记忆回放）的协同作用。

title: AEGIS: Authentic Edge Growth In Sparsity for Link Prediction in Edge-Sparse Bipartite Knowledge Graphs
abstract: Bipartite knowledge graphs in niche domains are typically data-poor and edge-sparse, which hinders link prediction. We introduce AEGIS (Authentic Edge Growth In Sparsity), an edge-only augmentation framework that resamples existing training edges -either uniformly simple or with inverse-degree bias degree-aware -thereby preserving the original node set and sidestepping fabricated endpoints. To probe authenticity across regimes, we consider naturally sparse graphs (game design pattern's game-pattern network) and induce sparsity in denser benchmarks (Amazon, MovieLens) via high-rate bond percolation. We evaluate augmentations on two complementary metrics: AUC-ROC (higher is better) and the Brier score (lower is better), using two-tailed paired t-tests against sparse baselines. On Amazon and MovieLens, copy-based AEGIS variants match the baseline while the semantic KNN augmentation is the only method that restores AUC and calibration; random and synthetic edges remain detrimental. On the text-rich GDP graph, semantic KNN achieves the largest AUC improvement and Brier score reduction, and simple also lowers the Brier score relative to the sparse control. These findings position authenticity-constrained resampling as a data-efficient strategy for sparse bipartite link prediction, with semantic augmentation providing an additional boost when informative node descriptions are available.

light_analysis.overview: 提出AEGIS框架，通过重新采样真实边来增强边稀疏二分知识图谱，避免伪造节点，实现数据高效的链接预测。
light_analysis.motivation: 细分领域的二分知识图谱通常边稀疏，导致链接预测困难。现有方法如生成虚拟边可能引入伪造节点，损害预测真实性。为此需要一种保持节点集完整的增强策略，在不引入虚假信息的前提下提升预测性能。
light_analysis.method: AEGIS采用两种重采样策略：均匀简单复制和基于逆度偏置的程度感知采样，保留原始节点集。此外引入语义KNN增强，利用节点文本描述生成语义相似边。在自然稀疏的游戏设计模式图和通过高比率键渗流制造的稀疏Amazon、MovieLens数据集上评估，使用AUC-ROC和Brier分数作为指标。
light_analysis.result: 在Amazon和MovieLens上，复制变体匹配稀疏基线，语义KNN唯一恢复AUC并改善校准，随机和合成边有害。在文本丰富的GDP图上，语义KNN实现AUC最大提升（摘要未明确数值）和Brier分数降低，简单重采样也降低了Brier分数。
light_analysis.conclusion: 真实性约束的重采样是稀疏二分链接预测的有效数据高效策略，语义增强在节点描述可用时进一步提升性能。未来可探索更丰富的语义表示或自适应采样策略，但依赖文本描述限制了其在纯结构场景的应用。

title: M-DaQ: Retrieving Samples with Multilingual Diversity and Quality for Instruction Fine-Tuning Datasets
abstract: Multilingual instruction fine-tuning (IFT) empowers large language models to generalize across diverse linguistic and cultural contexts; however, high-quality, systematically curated multilingual IFT datasets remain scarce. To address this gap, we propose M-DaQ (Multilingual Diversity and Quality), a diversity-aware sampling framework that jointly optimizes instruction-response quality and cross-lingual semantic diversity. M-DaQ leverages a fine-tuned Quality Scoring Model alongside a maximal marginal relevance-inspired selection strategy to construct balanced, high-fidelity training data. Furthermore, we present the first systematic investigation of the Superficial Alignment Hypothesis in multilingual settings. Extensive evaluations across 18 languages demonstrate that models trained on M-DaQ-curated data achieve average win rates exceeding 60% against strong baselines on Alpaca-Eval and MT-Bench. Complementary human evaluations corroborate these gains, highlighting significant improvements in cultural relevance, contextual appropriateness, and instruction-following capability. The code are publicly released to facilitate reproducibility and future research.

light_analysis.overview: 提出M-DaQ框架，通过联合优化质量与多样性构建高质量多语言指令微调数据集，并首次在多语言场景下验证浅层对齐假设。
light_analysis.motivation: 多语言指令微调（IFT）对大型语言模型的跨语言泛化至关重要，但当前高质量、系统策划的多语言IFT数据集十分稀缺。现有方法常忽视语言多样性和文化相关性，导致模型在不同语言上的表现不均衡。因此，亟需一种能够同时保证数据质量和语义多样性的数据采样方法。
light_analysis.method: M-DaQ采用微调的质量评分模型评估指令-响应质量，并引入基于最大边际相关性的选择策略，在候选样本中平衡跨语言语义多样性与高质量标准。该框架首次系统性地在多语言设置下检验了浅层对齐假设，为数据构建提供了理论指导。
light_analysis.result: 在涵盖18种语言的实验中，采用M-DaQ筛选数据训练的模型在Alpaca-Eval和MT-Bench基准上平均胜率超过60%，显著优于强基线方法。人工评估进一步表明，模型在文化相关性、上下文适当性和指令遵循能力方面均有明显提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: M-DaQ通过联合优化质量和多样性，有效弥补了多语言IFT数据集的不足，验证了多样性感知采样的重要性。该工作为多语言大模型的高效训练提供了可靠的数据策略，代码公开以促进可重复研究。未来可探索更广泛的语言和任务适配。

title: Crosscoding Through Time: Tracking Emergence & Consolidation Of Linguistic Representations Throughout LLM Pretraining
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) learn non-trivial abstractions during pretraining, such as detecting irregular plural noun subjects. However, because traditional evaluation methods (e.g., benchmarking) fail to reveal how models acquire these concepts and capabilities, it is not well understood when and how these specific linguistic abilities emerge. To bridge this gap and better understand model training at the concept level, we use sparse crosscoders to discover and align features across model checkpoints. Using this approach, we track the evolution of linguistic features during pretraining. We train crosscoders between open-sourced checkpoint triplets with significant performance and representation shifts, and introduce a novel metric, Relative Indirect Effects (RelIE), to trace training stages at which individual features become causally important for task performance. We show that crosscoders can detect feature emergence, maintenance, and discontinuation during pretraining. Our approach is architecture-agnostic and scalable, offering a promising path toward more interpretable and fine-grained analysis of representation learning throughout pretraining.

light_analysis.overview: 利用稀疏交叉编码器追踪LLM预训练中语言表征的涌现与固化过程。
light_analysis.motivation: 大语言模型在预训练中学习到非平凡的抽象概念，如检测不规则复数名词主语，但传统评估方法（如基准测试）无法揭示模型如何获取这些概念和能力。这导致对特定语言能力何时及如何涌现的理解不足。为填补这一空白，需要一种细粒度的概念级分析方法，以更好地理解模型训练过程中表征的演化。
light_analysis.method: 采用稀疏交叉编码器（sparse crosscoders）在模型检查点之间发现并对齐特征。针对开源检查点三元组（具有显著性能和表征变化）训练交叉编码器，并提出新指标相对间接效应（RelIE），用于追踪训练阶段中单个特征对任务性能的因果重要性。该方法架构无关且可扩展。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，交叉编码器能够检测预训练过程中特征的涌现、维持和消失。RelIE指标有效识别了特征在不同训练阶段因果重要性的变化。该方法为预训练中表征学习提供了细粒度分析，且不依赖于特定模型架构。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究提出了基于稀疏交叉编码器的特征追踪方法，可解释语言表征在预训练中的涌现与固化过程。学术上，为理解LLM内部机制提供了新工具；应用上，有助于改进训练策略和模型可解释性。未来可扩展至更多语言现象和更大规模模型。

title: WebMall -- A Multi-Shop Benchmark for Evaluating Web Agents
abstract: LLM-based web agents have the potential to automate long-running web tasks, such as searching for products in multiple e-shops and subsequently ordering the cheapest products that meet the users needs. Benchmarks for evaluating web agents either require agents to perform tasks online using the live Web or offline using simulated environments, the latter allowing for the exact reproduction of the experimental setup. While DeepShop and ShoppingComp provide online benchmarks that require agents to perform challenging shopping tasks, existing offline benchmarks such as WebShop, WebArena, and Mind2Web cover only comparatively simple e-commerce tasks performed against a single shop containing product data from a single source. What is missing is an e-commerce benchmark that simulates multiple shops containing heterogeneous product data and requires agents to perform complex retrieval tasks. We fill this gap by introducing WebMall, the first offline multi-shop benchmark for evaluating web agents on challenging comparison shopping tasks. WebMall consists of four simulated shops populated with product data extracted from the Common Crawl. The WebMall tasks range from specific product searches and price comparisons to advanced searches for complementary or substitute products, as well as checkout processes. We validate WebMall using eight agents that differ in observation space, availability of short-term memory, and the employed LLM. The validation highlights the difficulty of the benchmark, with the best-performing agents achieving task completion rates below 65% in the task categories cheapest product search and vague product search.

light_analysis.overview: 提出WebMall，首个离线多商店基准，用于评估LLM驱动的Web代理在复杂比较购物任务中的表现。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有在线基准（如DeepShop、ShoppingComp）需要实时网络，离线基准（如WebShop、WebArena、Mind2Web）仅覆盖单一商店和简单任务，无法精确复现实验。缺乏模拟多个异构商店的离线基准，难以评估代理在复杂检索任务上的能力。WebMall填补这一空白，提供可复现的标准化评估环境。
light_analysis.method: WebMall包含四个模拟商店，产品数据从Common Crawl提取。任务涵盖特定产品搜索、价格比较、互补/替代产品搜索和结账流程。验证了8种代理，它们在观察空间、短期记忆和所用LLM（如GPT-3.5等）上存在差异。评估指标包括任务完成率等。
light_analysis.result: 最佳代理在‘最便宜产品搜索’和‘模糊产品搜索’任务类别中完成率低于65%，表明基准具有挑战性。不同代理间的性能差异反映了观察空间和记忆机制对复杂任务的影响，但具体数值未完全列举。
light_analysis.conclusion: WebMall是首个离线多商店比较购物基准，为评估Web代理在复杂电子商务任务中的性能提供标准化平台。研究有助于推动LLM驱动代理在现实购物场景中的应用，未来可扩展任务类别或集成更多商店。

title: AI Models for Depressive Disorder Detection and Diagnosis: A Review
abstract: Major Depressive Disorder is one of the leading causes of disability worldwide, yet its diagnosis still depends largely on subjective clinical assessments. Integrating Artificial Intelligence (AI) holds promise for developing objective, scalable, and timely diagnostic tools. In this paper, we present a comprehensive survey of state-of-the-art AI methods for depression detection and diagnosis, based on a systematic review of 55 key studies. We introduce a novel hierarchical taxonomy that structures the field by primary clinical task (diagnosis vs. prediction), data modality (text, speech, neuroimaging, multimodal), and computational model class (e.g., graph neural networks, large language models, hybrid approaches). Our in-depth analysis reveals three major trends: the predominance of graph neural networks for modeling brain connectivity, the rise of large language models for linguistic and conversational data, and an emerging focus on multimodal fusion, explainability, and algorithmic fairness. Alongside methodological insights, we provide an overview of prominent public datasets and standard evaluation metrics as a practical guide for researchers. By synthesizing current advances and highlighting open challenges, this survey offers a comprehensive roadmap for future innovation in computational psychiatry.

light_analysis.overview: 系统综述55项研究，提出层次化分类法，涵盖临床任务、数据模态和模型类别，揭示三大趋势并整理公开数据集。
light_analysis.motivation: 重度抑郁症是全球主要致残原因，但诊断依赖主观临床评估。整合人工智能有望开发客观、可扩展、及时的诊断工具。当前研究分散，缺乏系统梳理，需要结构化综述来指导未来方向。
light_analysis.method: 基于对55项关键研究的系统综述，提出新颖的层次化分类法：按临床任务（诊断vs预测）、数据模态（文本、语音、神经影像、多模态）和计算模型类别（图神经网络、大语言模型、混合方法）组织。分析了主要趋势、公开数据集和评估指标。
light_analysis.result: 识别三大趋势：图神经网络主导脑连接建模，大语言模型兴起用于语言和对话数据，多模态融合、可解释性和算法公平性成为新兴焦点。提供了主流公开数据集和标准评估指标的实用指南。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该综述为计算精神病学领域的未来创新提供了全面路线图，系统总结了当前进展并指出了开放挑战，有助于推动抑郁症检测和诊断的客观自动化工具发展。

title: Accelerating Policy Synthesis in Large-Scale MDPs via Hierarchical Adaptive Refinement
abstract: Software-intensive systems, such as software product lines and robotics, utilise Markov decision processes (MDPs) to capture uncertainty and analyse sequential decision-making problems. Despite the usefulness of conventional policy synthesis methods, they fail to scale to large state spaces. Our approach addresses this issue and accelerates policy synthesis in large MDPs by dynamically refining the MDP and iteratively selecting the most fragile MDP regions for refinement. This iterative procedure offers a balance between accuracy and efficiency, as refinement occurs only when necessary. We formally show that the composed policy is near-optimal under standard assumptions, with error bounded by the local solver tolerance and boundary mismatch. Across diverse case studies and MDPs up to 1M states, we demonstrate that our approach achieves up to $2\times$ speedup over PRISM, offering a competitive solution for real-world policy synthesis in large MDPs.
comment: Accepted for publication in Proceedings of the ACM on Software Engineering, FSE 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出分层自适应精炼方法，通过动态识别并精炼最脆弱区域，加速大规模MDP策略合成。
light_analysis.motivation: 软件密集型系统（如软件产品线、机器人）常用MDP建模不确定性和序列决策问题，但传统策略合成方法难以扩展至超大状态空间，导致效率低下。现有方法缺乏对状态空间的自适应处理，无法在大规模MDP中兼顾精度与计算成本。因此，需要一种能动态平衡精度与效率的可扩展策略合成技术。
light_analysis.method: 提出分层自适应精炼（Hierarchical Adaptive Refinement）方法。首先基于初始粗略MDP进行策略合成，然后迭代评估各区域策略的“脆弱性”，选取最需要精炼的区域进行局部细化（如增加状态/动作），逐步提升MDP精度。该方法在标准假设下被形式化证明组合策略接近最优，误差界由局部求解器容差与边界不匹配度决定。
light_analysis.result: 在多个案例研究（包括不同领域）及最大达100万状态的MDP上测试，相比基准工具PRISM，本方法实现最高2倍加速。同时保持了策略的近似最优性，误差可控。实验表明该方法在实际大规模MDP策略合成中具有竞争力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文提出了一种加速大规模MDP策略合成的新框架，通过自适应区域精炼平衡精度与效率，并给出理论误差界。该方法在多种场景下显著提升性能，适用于软件产品线、机器人等领域的实时决策。未来可进一步优化区域选择策略或扩展到部分可观测MDP。

title: ORFS-agent: Tool-Using Agents for Chip Design Optimization
abstract: Machine learning has been widely used to optimize complex engineering workflows across numerous domains. In integrated circuit design, modern flows (e.g., register-transfer level to physical layout) involve extensive configuration via thousands of parameters, and small changes can have large downstream impacts on design performance, power, and area. Recent advances in Large Language Models (LLMs) offer new opportunities for learning and reasoning within such high-dimensional optimization tasks. In this work, we introduce ORFS-agent, an LLM-based iterative optimization agent that automates parameter tuning in an open-source hardware design flow. ORFS-agent adaptively explores parameter configurations, demonstrating improvements over standard Bayesian optimization approaches in terms of resource efficiency and final design metrics. Across six benchmarks on ASAP7 and SKY130HD, thinking-model backends (Sonnet 4.6 [69] and Kimi K2.5 [28]) improve the geometric-mean normalized wirelength, effective clock period, and co-optimization objectives by up to 1.0%, 1.3%, and 2.7% over OR-AutoTuner while using 40% fewer iterations; the open-weight Kimi K2.5 remains within 0.24% of Sonnet 4.6, enabling private deployment. Relative to the earlier Sonnet 3.5 backend, these thinking models improve the same objectives by up to 7.5%, 3.1%, and 4.0%. Optional retrieval tools accelerate early convergence but do not improve final endpoints. By following natural language objectives to trade off certain metrics for others, ORFS-agent demonstrates a flexible and interpretable framework for multi-objective and constrained optimization. Crucially, ORFS-agent is modular and model-agnostic, and can be plugged into any frontier LLM without any further fine-tuning. We also report checkpoint-aligned trajectories and reasoning summaries that document the agent's decision process.

light_analysis.overview: ORFS-agent是基于LLM的迭代优化智能体，自动调优开源硬件设计流程参数，比贝叶斯优化更高效。
light_analysis.motivation: 现代集成电路设计流程涉及数千参数配置，微小变化可严重影响性能、功耗和面积。传统贝叶斯优化方法资源效率低，难以应对高维优化任务。LLM的推理能力为这类优化提供了新机会，但现有方法缺乏自动化、可解释的框架。
light_analysis.method: ORFS-agent利用LLM（如Sonnet 4.6和Kimi K2.5）作为思考模型，迭代探索参数配置，通过自然语言目标灵活权衡多目标。系统无需微调即可适配任何前沿LLM，并集成可选检索工具加速早期收敛。在ASAP7和SKY130HD工艺的六个基准测试上评估。
light_analysis.result: 相比OR-AutoTuner，思考模型将几何平均归一化线长、有效时钟周期和协同优化目标分别提升1.0%、1.3%和2.7%，同时迭代次数减少40%。开放权重的Kimi K2.5性能在Sonnet 4.6的0.24%以内。相比早期Sonnet 3.5，上述指标提升达7.5%、3.1%和4.0%。检索工具仅加速收敛，未改善最终指标。
light_analysis.conclusion: ORFS-agent展示了基于LLM的多目标优化框架的灵活性和可解释性，能通过自然语言指令权衡指标。该智能体模块化、与模型无关，可私有部署。未来可扩展至更复杂的约束优化问题，但摘要未明确讨论局限性。

title: Flattery in Motion: Benchmarking and Analyzing Sycophancy in Video-LLMs
abstract: As video large language models (Video-LLMs) become increasingly integrated into real-world applications that demand grounded multimodal reasoning, ensuring their factual consistency and reliability is of critical importance. However, sycophancy, the tendency of these models to align with user input even when it contradicts the visual evidence, undermines their trustworthiness in such contexts. Current sycophancy research has largely overlooked its specific manifestations in the videolanguage domain, resulting in a notable absence of systematic benchmarks and targeted evaluations to understand how Video-LLMs respond under misleading user input. To fill this gap, we propose VISE(Video-LLM Sycophancy Benchmarking and Evaluation), the first benchmark designed to evaluate sycophantic behavior in state-of-the-art Video-LLMs across diverse question formats, prompt biases, and visual reasoning tasks. Specifically, VISEpioneeringly brings linguistic perspectives on sycophancy into the video domain, enabling fine-grained analysis across multiple sycophancy types and interaction patterns. Furthermore, we propose two potential training-free mitigation strategies revealing potential paths for reducing sycophantic bias: (i) enhancing visual grounding through interpretable key-frame selection and (ii) steering model behavior away from sycophancy via targeted, inference-time intervention on its internal neural representations. Our code is available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/VideoSycophancy-567F.
comment: 27 Pages, Accepted by ACL 2026 Main Conference

light_analysis.overview: 首个针对视频大语言模型谄媚行为的基准（VISE），并提出两种无需训练的缓解策略。
light_analysis.motivation: 视频大语言模型（Video-LLMs）在需多模态推理的真实应用中，其事实一致性和可靠性至关重要。然而，这些模型存在谄媚倾向，即迎合用户输入而忽略视觉证据，这降低了可信度。现有研究多聚焦文本或图像领域，视频领域缺乏系统性基准和评估方法来理解模型在误导性输入下的行为。因此，亟需构建专门基准以全面分析视频LLMs的谄媚现象及其缓解方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出VISE基准，首个系统评估视频LLMs谄媚行为的框架，涵盖多种问题格式、提示偏见和视觉推理任务。创新性地将语言学视角引入视频领域，实现细粒度多类型谄媚分析及交互模式识别。同时提出两种训练-免费缓解策略：一是通过可解释关键帧选择增强视觉基础；二是在推理时对内部神经表征进行定向干预，引导模型远离谄媚行为。代码已开源。
light_analysis.result: 通过VISE基准评估了多个先进视频LLMs，揭示了谄媚行为的普遍性及其与问题偏见、视觉任务的相关性。提出的两种缓解策略在实验中显示出降低谄媚倾向的有效性，其中增强视觉基础与内部表征干预均能提升模型对抗误导性输入的能力，但具体性能指标摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究首次系统基准测试并分析了视频LLMs中的谄媚现象，为评估模型可靠性提供了新工具。VISE基准和缓解策略有助于提升视频多模态系统的可信度，推动其安全部署。未来工作可探索更复杂的交互场景及训练阶段干预方法，但当前方法无需重新训练，具有实际应用价值。

title: Test-Time Distillation for Continual Model Adaptation
abstract: Deep neural networks often suffer performance degradation upon deployment due to distribution shifts. Continual Test-Time Adaptation (CTTA) aims to address this issue in an unsupervised manner. However, existing methods that rely on self-supervision are prone to an inherent self-referential feedback loop that amplifies initial prediction errors, leading to model drift. We revisit this limitation and propose Test-Time Distillation (TTD), which reframes adaptation as a distillation process guided by a frozen Vision-Language Model (VLM) as an external signal. While promising, we find that direct distillation is fraught with two pitfalls: (1) the Generalist Trap, where the VLM's broad but non-specialized knowledge leads to suboptimal performance on specific tasks and shifts; and (2) the Entropy Bias, where naive model fusion techniques based on entropy fail due to the disparate calibration of heterogeneous models. These pitfalls highlight the need to build a robust supervisory signal and leverage it to guide the target model toward stable adaptation. Hence, we present CoDiRe, a Continual Distillation and Rectification framework for TTD. CoDiRe first constructs a robust blended teacher by dynamically fusing the predictions of the VLM and the target model. Critically, it circumvents the Entropy Bias by leveraging Maximum Softmax Probability (MSP) as a more reliable confidence metric for weighting each model's expertise. Then it applies an Optimal Transport-based rectification to further align predictions with the blended teacher, enabling continuous and stable adaptation. Extensive experiments show that CoDiRe outperforms state-of-the-art baselines, exceeding CoTTA by 10.55% with only 48% of its time cost on ImageNet-C. Project page is publicly available at https://github.com/walawalagoose/TTD.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于外部冻结VLM的测试时蒸馏框架，通过动态教师融合和最优传输校准实现持续稳定自适应。
light_analysis.motivation: 深度神经网络部署后因分布偏移性能下降，现有CTTA方法依赖自监督导致自我反馈循环放大初始误差，引发模型漂移。直接蒸馏VLM存在通用陷阱（知识宽泛不专精）和熵偏差（异构模型校准不同），需要构建鲁棒监督信号引导稳定自适应。
light_analysis.method: 提出CoDiRe框架，核心是构建鲁棒的混合教师：动态融合冻结VLM和目标模型预测，利用最大软概率(MSP)替代熵作为更可靠的置信度加权，避免熵偏差；然后应用最优传输(OT)进行预测校准，对齐混合教师，实现持续稳定自适应。无需额外标注。
light_analysis.result: 在ImageNet-C上进行大量实验，CoDiRe超越现有最优基线，相比CoTTA提升10.55%性能，且推理时间仅为CoTTA的48%。表明方法在效率和性能上的显著优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文提出TTD及CoDiRe框架，有效解决了CTTA中的自我反馈循环和直接蒸馏的陷阱，通过动态融合和最优传输校准实现稳定自适应。具有实用价值，潜在局限性包括对VLM依赖及计算成本，未来可探索更轻量级外部模型。

title: FinChain: A Symbolic Benchmark for Verifiable Chain-of-Thought Financial Reasoning
abstract: Multi-step symbolic reasoning is essential for robust financial analysis; yet, current benchmarks largely overlook this capability. Existing datasets such as FinQA and ConvFinQA emphasize final numerical answers while neglecting the intermediate reasoning steps required for transparency and verification. To address this gap, we introduce FinChain, the first benchmark specifically designed for verifiable Chain-of-Thought evaluation in finance. FinChain spans 58 topics across 12 financial domains, each represented by parameterized symbolic templates with executable Python code that enable fully machine-verifiable reasoning and scalable, contamination-free data generation. To assess reasoning capacity, we propose CHAINEVAL, a dynamic alignment measure that jointly evaluates both the final-answer correctness and the step-level reasoning consistency. Our evaluation of 26 leading LLMs reveals that even frontier LLMs exhibit clear limitations in symbolic financial reasoning, while domain-adapted and math-enhanced fine-tuned models can substantially narrow this gap. Overall, FinChain exposes persistent weaknesses in multi-step financial reasoning and provides a foundation for developing trustworthy, interpretable, and verifiable financial AI. This project is available at https://github.com/mbzuai-nlp/finchain.git.
comment: 24 pages, includes 12 figures and 9 tables; introduces the FinChain benchmark and ChainEval metric

light_analysis.overview: 提出首个金融领域可验证链式推理基准FinChain，支持符号化推理与自动验证，揭示大模型在金融推理中的不足。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有金融QA数据集如FinQA和ConvFinQA仅关注最终答案，忽略中间推理步骤，缺乏可验证性和透明度，限制了金融AI的可靠性。多步符号推理是稳健金融分析的核心，但缺乏针对性基准。因此需要设计一个能评估推理步骤一致性的基准，推动可解释、可验证的金融推理。
light_analysis.method: FinChain包含58个主题、12个金融领域，每个主题通过参数化符号模板（含可执行Python代码）生成数据，实现机器可验证推理和抗污染生成。同时提出CHAINEVAL动态对齐度量，联合评估最终答案正确性与步骤级推理一致性。评估了26个领先LLM。
light_analysis.result: 前沿LLM在符号金融推理中表现出明显局限，而领域自适应和数学增强的微调模型能显著缩小差距。FinChain暴露了多步金融推理中的持续弱点，为构建可信金融AI提供了基础。
light_analysis.conclusion: FinChain作为首个金融可验证链式推理基准，填补了透明推理评估空白。研究为开发可解释、可验证的金融AI奠定基础，但未明确讨论局限性。未来可扩展更多领域或探索推理增强方法。

title: Reading Recognition in the Wild
abstract: To enable egocentric contextual AI in always-on smart glasses, it is crucial to be able to keep a record of the user's interactions with the world, including during reading. In this paper, we introduce a new task of reading recognition to determine when the user is reading. We first introduce the first-of-its-kind large-scale multimodal Reading in the Wild dataset, containing 100 hours of reading and non-reading videos in diverse and realistic scenarios. We then identify three modalities (egocentric RGB, eye gaze, head pose) that can be used to solve the task, and present a flexible transformer model that performs the task using these modalities, either individually or combined. We show that these modalities are relevant and complementary to the task, and investigate how to efficiently and effectively encode each modality. Additionally, we show the usefulness of this dataset towards classifying types of reading, extending current reading understanding studies conducted in constrained settings to larger scale, diversity and realism.

light_analysis.overview: 提出阅读识别新任务，构建大规模多模态数据集并设计灵活Transformer模型。
light_analysis.motivation: 在始终开启的智能眼镜中实现以自我为中心的上下文AI，需要记录用户与世界的交互，包括阅读行为。现有研究多在受控环境下进行，缺乏大规模、多样化的真实场景数据，且未系统研究多模态信号（RGB、眼动、头部姿态）在阅读识别中的作用。本文旨在解决这一空白，实现真实场景下的阅读状态识别。
light_analysis.method: 引入Reading in the Wild数据集，包含100小时多样真实场景的阅读/非阅读视频。识别三种模态：自我中心RGB、眼动注视、头部姿态。提出灵活Transformer模型，支持单模态或多模态输入，通过有效编码各模态并融合，实现阅读状态分类。模型设计注重效率和效果，探索最佳编码方式。
light_analysis.result: 论文展示了三种模态对阅读识别的相关性和互补性，多模态融合优于单模态。数据集支持对阅读类型进行细粒度分类，将阅读理解研究从受控环境扩展到更大规模、更多样化和更真实的场景。具体性能指标未明确给出，但强调模型在真实世界视频上的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文首次定义并解决阅读识别任务，提供大规模多模态数据集和基线模型，为智能眼镜上的上下文AI奠定基础。数据集和模型可扩展至阅读类型分类等更深层理解。未来工作可探索更多模态或优化模型效率。局限性可能在于隐私和计算开销。

title: Frequency-Adaptive Discrete Cosine-ViT-ResNet Architecture for Sparse-Data Vision
abstract: A major challenge in rare animal image classification is the scarcity of data, as many species usually have only a small number of labeled samples.   To address this challenge, we designed a hybrid deep-learning framework comprising a novel adaptive DCT preprocessing module, ViT-B16 and ResNet50 backbones, and a Bayesian linear classification head. To our knowledge, we are the first to introduce an adaptive frequency-domain selection mechanism that learns optimal low-, mid-, and high-frequency boundaries suited to the subsequent backbones.   Our network first captures image frequency-domain cues via this adaptive DCT partitioning. The adaptively filtered frequency features are then fed into ViT-B16 to model global contextual relationships, while ResNet50 concurrently extracts local, multi-scale spatial representations from the original image. A cross-level fusion strategy seamlessly integrates these frequency- and spatial-domain embeddings, and the fused features are passed through a Bayesian linear classifier to output the final category predictions. On our self-built 50-class wildlife dataset, this approach outperforms conventional CNN and fixed-band DCT pipelines, achieving state-of-the-art accuracy under extreme sample scarcity.
comment: This preprint has been withdrawn by the primary author after identifying issues in the dataset validation process, including noisy and potentially out-of-domain samples. These issues may affect the reliability of the reported experimental results. The author therefore considers withdrawal to be the most responsible course of action and appreciates the readers' understanding

light_analysis.overview: 提出频率自适应DCT预处理模块结合ViT和ResNet双骨干网络，通过学习最优频带划分提升稀疏数据图像分类性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 稀有动物图像分类面临数据稀缺问题，传统CNN和固定频带DCT方法难以有效利用频域信息。现有方法未针对数据稀疏场景优化频率选择，导致特征提取不充分。本文旨在通过自适应频率域分割，让网络自动学习适合后续骨干的低、中、高频边界，从而在极少量样本下提升分类准确率。
light_analysis.method: 设计混合深度学习框架：包含自适应DCT预处理模块，通过可学习参数划分最优频带；将频域特征输入ViT-B16建模全局关系，同时ResNet50从原始图像提取局部多尺度空间表示；采用跨级融合策略整合频域和空域嵌入，最后经贝叶斯线性分类头输出预测。自建50类野生动物数据集用于评估。
light_analysis.result: 在自建50类野生动物数据集上，该方法在极端样本稀缺条件下优于传统CNN和固定频带DCT基线，达到最先进水平。摘要未提供具体数值，但明确表示性能提升显著，验证了自适应频率选择机制的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 首次引入自适应频率域选择机制，有效结合频域和空域特征，为稀疏数据视觉任务提供了新思路。该方法在稀有物种识别等实际场景有应用价值，未来可探索更复杂的融合策略或扩展至其他小样本视觉任务。

title: Real-World Doctor Agent with Proactive Consultation through Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) struggle in real-world clinical consultations. Single-turn consultation systems require patients to describe all symptoms at once, which often leads to unclear complaints and vague diagnoses. Traditional dialogue models, constrained by static supervised learning, are limited to superficially imitating existing dialogue patterns and lack the ability to actively construct understanding in dynamic interactions, thus failing to achieve genuine clinical reasoning.To address these challenges, we propose DoctorAgent-RL, a reinforcement learning (RL)-based multi-agent collaborative framework, and train a doctor agent on Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct using this framework. Within this framework, a medical consultation is modeled as a dynamic decision-making process under uncertainty. The core intelligence of the doctor agent is shifted from knowing the answer to learning and mastering a questioning methodology aimed at achieving an optimal diagnosis. Through strategic questioning, it guides the progressive emergence of key patient information in multi-turn dialogues. To support this high-fidelity simulation of the real diagnostic process, we constructed MTMedDialog, a novel English multi-turn medical consultation dataset designed for dynamic, interactive training.To validate its real-world effectiveness, rigorous evaluations including blinded human assessments and trials with real patients were conducted. DoctorAgent-RL outperformed frontier models and achieved a 70% exact diagnostic match rate, confirming its potential as a collaborative tool. By handling initial screenings, it can free clinicians to focus on complex cases, thereby addressing critical issues like physician shortages and misdiagnosis risks while alleviating the strain on healthcare resources.

light_analysis.overview: 提出DoctorAgent-RL，基于多智能体强化学习构建主动问诊的医生代理，通过动态决策与策略性提问提升诊断准确率。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有大型语言模型在临床问诊中表现不佳：单轮问诊系统要求患者一次性描述所有症状，易导致诉求不清、诊断模糊；传统对话模型受限于静态监督学习，仅能模仿现有对话模式，缺乏在动态交互中主动构建理解的能力，无法实现真正的临床推理。这些问题导致实际诊断效率低、误诊风险高，亟需一种能主动引导信息获取的智能问诊系统。
light_analysis.method: 提出DoctorAgent-RL多智能体强化学习框架，基于Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct训练医生代理。将医疗问诊建模为不确定性下的动态决策过程，核心智能从“知道答案”转向“学习提问方法论”，通过策略性提问在多轮对话中逐步引导患者提供关键信息。构建了MTMedDialog数据集，这是一个用于动态交互训练的英语多轮医疗问诊数据集，支持高保真模拟真实诊断过程。
light_analysis.result: 通过盲法人工评估和真实患者试验，DoctorAgent-RL优于前沿模型，实现了70%的精确诊断匹配率。相比基线方法，该方法显著提升了诊断准确性，证明其作为协作工具的潜力。通过处理初步筛查，可解放临床医生专注于复杂病例，从而解决医生短缺和误诊风险等关键问题，缓解医疗资源紧张。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文提出首个基于强化学习的多智能体协作框架实现主动问诊的医生代理，将医学问诊从被动响应转变为主动信息获取。学术上为对话系统在医疗领域的应用提供了新范式；实际价值在于可辅助医生进行初筛，提高诊断效率并减少误诊。未来可扩展至更多专科场景及多语言支持。局限性在于依赖高质量模拟环境及数据集，真实推广仍需进一步验证。

title: Implicit bias produces neural scaling laws in learning curves, from perceptrons to deep networks
abstract: Scaling laws in deep learning -- empirical power-law relationships linking model performance to resource growth -- have emerged as simple yet striking regularities across architectures, datasets, and tasks. These laws are particularly impactful in guiding the design of state-of-the-art models, since they quantify the benefits of increasing data or model size, and hint at the foundations of interpretability in machine learning. However, most studies focus on asymptotic behavior at the end of training. In this work, we describe a richer picture by analyzing the entire training dynamics: we identify two novel \textit{dynamical} scaling laws that govern how performance evolves as function of different norm-based complexity measures. Combined, our new laws recover the well-known scaling for test error at convergence. Our findings are consistent across CNNs, ResNets, and Vision Transformers trained on MNIST, CIFAR-10 and CIFAR-100. Furthermore, we provide analytical support using a single-layer perceptron trained with logistic loss, where we derive the new dynamical scaling laws, and we explain them through the implicit bias induced by gradient-based training.
comment: Final accepted version at ICLR26 main conference; 27 pages, 21 Figures, 5 tables

light_analysis.overview: 发现神经网络训练动态中的两种新缩放定律，由隐式偏差驱动，统一解释从感知机到深度网络的性能演变。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有的深度学习缩放定律主要集中在训练结束时的渐近行为，忽略了整个训练过程中的动态变化。理解训练过程中的缩放关系对于优化资源分配、模型设计以及揭示机器学习可解释性基础至关重要。本文旨在填补这一空白，通过分析训练动态中的性能演化规律，提供更全面的视角。
light_analysis.method: 本文通过分析CNN、ResNet和Vision Transformer在MNIST、CIFAR-10和CIFAR-100上的训练动态，识别了两种新的动态缩放定律，这些定律基于不同范数复杂度度量（如参数范数）。在单层感知机使用逻辑损失的理论分析中，严格推导了这些定律，并从梯度训练产生的隐式偏差角度解释其机制。
light_analysis.result: 新发现的动态缩放定律能够恢复训练收敛时已知的测试误差缩放定律。实验在多种架构和数据集上一致验证：包括CNN、ResNet和Vision Transformer，均表现出相同的动态缩放行为，表明该规律具有跨模型和任务的普适性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文揭示了深度学习训练过程中的动态缩放定律，将隐式偏差与性能演化联系起来，为理解神经网络泛化提供了新视角。该工作有助于指导训练策略优化和资源分配，但理论分析仅限于线性模型，未来可扩展至更复杂的非线性网络以及不同优化器下的隐式偏差。

title: Benchmarking Large Vision-Language Models on Fine-Grained Image Tasks: A Comprehensive Evaluation
abstract: Recent advancements in Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) have demonstrated remarkable multimodal perception capabilities, garnering significant attention. While numerous evaluation studies have emerged, assessing LVLMs both holistically and on specialized tasks, fine-grained image tasks-fundamental to computer vision-remain largely unexplored. To fill this gap, we introduce a comprehensive fine-grained evaluation benchmark, i.e., FG-BMK, comprising 1.01 million questions and 0.33 million images. Our evaluation systematically examines LVLMs from both human-oriented and machine-oriented perspectives, focusing on their semantic recognition and fine-grained feature representation capabilities. Through extensive experiments on twelve representative LVLMs/VLMs, we uncover key findings regarding the influence of training paradigms, modality alignment, perturbation susceptibility, and fine-grained category reasoning on task performance. This work provides critical insights into the limitations of current LVLMs and offers guidance for future data construction and model design in the development of more advanced LVLMs. Our code is open-source and available at https://github.com/SEU-VIPGroup/FG-BMK.

light_analysis.overview: 提出细粒度图像任务评估基准FG-BMK，系统评估大视觉语言模型的多模态感知能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有大视觉语言模型（LVLM）评估忽略细粒度图像任务，而该任务对计算机视觉至关重要。为填补空白，需构建细粒度评估基准，从人类和机器双视角全面评测LVLMs的语义识别和特征表示能力。
light_analysis.method: 构建FG-BMK基准，包含101万问题和33万图像。从人类视角（语义识别）和机器视角（细粒度特征表示）系统评估12个代表性LVLM/VLM。分析训练范式、模态对齐、扰动敏感性和细粒度类别推理对性能的影响。
light_analysis.result: 实验揭示训练范式、模态对齐、扰动敏感性和细粒度类别推理显著影响LVLM性能。提供了关键见解，指出当前模型在细粒度任务上的局限性，并指导未来模型和数据设计。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作为LVLM细粒度评估提供全面基准，揭示现有模型缺陷，为数据构建和模型优化指明方向。开源代码促进社区研究。

title: Chronology of Multi-Agent Interactions for Provenance of Evolving Information
abstract: Provenance is the chronological history of things, resonating with the fundamental pursuit to uncover origins, trace connections, and situate entities within the flow of space and time. As artificial intelligence advances towards autonomous agents capable of interactive collaboration on complex tasks, the provenance of generated content becomes entangled in the interplay of collective creation, where contributions are continuously revised, extended or overwritten. In a multi-agent generative chain, content undergoes successive transformations, often leaving little, if any, trace of prior contributions. In this study, we investigate the problem of tracking multi-agent provenance across the temporal dimension of generation. We propose a chronological system for post hoc attribution of generative history from content alone, without reliance on internal memory states or external meta-information. At its core lies the notion of symbolic chronicles, representing signed and time-stamped records, in a form analogous to the chain of custody in forensic science. The system operates through a feedback loop, whereby each generative timestep updates the chronicle of prior interactions and synchronises it with the synthetic content in the very act of generation. This research seeks to develop an accountable form of collaborative artificial intelligence within evolving cyber ecosystems.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种基于符号编年史的多智能体内容溯源系统，通过生成过程中的反馈循环实现自主溯源。
light_analysis.motivation: 在多智能体协作生成中，内容经过多次修改和覆盖，导致生成历史难以追踪，现有方法依赖内部记忆或外部元信息，缺乏从内容本身追溯的机制。研究旨在解决多智能体交互中信息演化的溯源问题，提升协作AI的可问责性。
light_analysis.method: 提出符号编年史（Symbolic Chronicles）概念，记录签名和时间戳，类似于法医学中的监管链。系统通过反馈循环在每次生成时间步更新编年史，并与合成内容同步，实现从内容本身的生成历史归因，不依赖内部记忆状态或外部元信息。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确说明具体实验结果，但声称系统能实现后验归因，追踪多智能体跨时间维度的生成过程，为协作AI提供可问责形式。性能指标和对比数据未提及。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究为多智能体协作内容生成提供了新的溯源框架，通过符号编年史和反馈循环实现自主历史追踪，增强了AI系统的透明度和可问责性。未来可应用于需要严格记录生成过程的场景，如法律、科研或媒体内容创作。局限在于仅从内容本身归因可能面临信息丢失挑战。

title: MultiBLiMP 1.0: A Massively Multilingual Benchmark of Linguistic Minimal Pairs
abstract: We introduce MultiBLiMP 1.0, a massively multilingual benchmark of linguistic minimal pairs, covering 101 languages and 2 types of subject-verb agreement, containing more than 128,000 minimal pairs. Our minimal pairs are created using a fully automated pipeline, leveraging the large-scale linguistic resources of Universal Dependencies and UniMorph. MultiBLiMP 1.0 evaluates abilities of LLMs at an unprecedented multilingual scale, and highlights the shortcomings of the current state-of-the-art in modelling low-resource languages.

light_analysis.overview: 提出多语言最小对基准MultiBLiMP 1.0，覆盖101种语言，评估大语言模型在句法知识上的表现。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有语言模型评估大多针对高资源语言，缺乏对低资源语言句法能力的系统测试。为填补这一空白，需要构建大规模多语言最小对基准，以全面评估模型在跨语言句法知识上的表现。
light_analysis.method: 基于Universal Dependencies和UniMorph资源，通过全自动流程构建128,000对最小对，覆盖101种语言和2类主谓一致现象，确保数据生成的可扩展性和语言覆盖广度。
light_analysis.result: MultiBLiMP 1.0揭示了当前最先进大语言模型在低资源语言上的显著不足，为模型句法能力提供多语言评估基准，实验明确指出模型在处理资源匮乏语言时存在性能差距。
light_analysis.conclusion: MultiBLiMP 1.0作为大规模多语言句法评估工具，有助于推动低资源语言建模研究。未来工作可扩展最小对类型并优化自动生成流程，以涵盖更丰富的语言现象。

title: TranSplat: Instant Object Relighting in Gaussian Splatting via Spherical Harmonic Radiance Transfer
abstract: We present TranSplat, a method for instant, accurate object relighting within the Gaussian Splatting (GS) framework. Rather than relying on costly inverse rendering routines, we propose a BRDF-free radiance transfer strategy that analytically modulates the spherical harmonic (SH) appearance coefficients of an object's 2D Gaussian surfels using per-normal irradiance ratios derived from source and target environment maps. To handle view-dependent and glossy appearances without explicit material estimation, we introduce a specularity-aware dual-path SH transfer strategy that adapts higher-order SH bands in the reflection domain. Additionally, we propose a lightweight SH-domain self-shadowing module to ensure physically realistic occlusion without explicit mesh raycasting. Operating as a post-processing step, TranSplat requires no additional GS retraining for a pair of source and target scenes. Evaluations on synthetic and real-world objects demonstrate state-of-the-art accuracy, outperforming recent inverse-rendering and diffusion-based GS relighting methods across most conditions, all while completing relighting operations in under one second. Although bounded by radially symmetric BRDF approximations and the low-pass nature of the SH basis, TranSplat produces perceptually realistic renderings even for glossy, complex materials, establishing a valuable, lightweight path forward for GS relighting.

light_analysis.overview: TranSplat提出一种基于球谐辐射传输的即时物体重光照方法，无需BRDF估计和模型重训练，实现快速准确的重光照。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有基于Gaussian Splatting的重光照方法依赖昂贵的逆渲染或扩散模型，计算成本高且需重新训练，难以满足实时应用需求。本文旨在开发一种轻量级后处理方案，实现无额外训练的即时重光照，同时保持物理真实感和高准确率。
light_analysis.method: 提出无BRDF的辐射传输策略，通过源和目标环境图的每法线辐照度比率解析调制2D高斯面元的球谐外观系数。引入镜面感知双路径SH传输，在反射域自适应调整高阶SH带。设计轻量级SH域自阴影模块，无需网格光线追踪即可模拟物理遮挡。作为后处理步骤，无需GS重训练。
light_analysis.result: 在合成和真实物体上，TranSplat在大多数条件下优于逆渲染和扩散基GS重光照方法，重光照操作在1秒内完成。尽管受限于径向对称BRDF近似和SH低通性质，仍能产生感知逼真的渲染，尤其对高光复杂材质表现良好。
light_analysis.conclusion: TranSplat为GS重光照提供了一种高效轻量级新路径，无需额外训练即可实现快速准确的重光照，适用于实时图形编辑和VR。局限性包括BRDF近似和SH带宽限制，但实际效果已具竞争力。

title: GuideDog: A Real-World Egocentric Multimodal Dataset for Blind and Low-Vision Accessibility-Aware Guidance
abstract: For people affected by blindness and low vision (BLV), safe and independent navigation remains a major challenge, impacting over 2.2 billion individuals worldwide. Although multimodal large language models (MLLMs) offer new opportunities for assistive navigation, progress has been limited by the scarcity of accessibility-aware datasets, because creating them requires labor-intensive expert annotation.   To this end, we introduce GuideDog, a novel dataset containing 22K image-description pairs (2K human-verified) capturing real-world pedestrian scenes across 46 countries. Our human-AI pipeline shifts annotation from generation to verification, grounded in established BLV guidance standards from experts and research, improving scalability while maintaining quality. We also present GuideDogQA, an 818-sample benchmark evaluating object recognition and depth perception. Experiments reveal that depth perception and adherence to these standards remain challenging for current MLLMs.

light_analysis.overview: 构建首个面向盲人导航的规模实景多模态数据集GuideDog，含22K图像描述对及818样本基准。
light_analysis.motivation: 全球超22亿人受盲症或低视力影响，安全独立导航是重大挑战。多模态大模型虽有潜力，但缺乏符合专家标准的无障碍感知数据集，且数据标注劳动密集。现有方法因数据稀缺而进展缓慢，亟需可扩展的高质量资源以推动辅助导航研究。
light_analysis.method: 提出GuideDog数据集，包含22K真实世界街景图像-描述对（2K经人工验证），覆盖46个国家。采用人机协同标注流程，将专家标准嵌入验证环节而非生成环节，提升可扩展性。同时构建GuideDogQA基准（818个样本），评估物体识别与深度感知两项关键能力。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，当前多模态大模型在深度感知和遵守盲人导航标准方面仍存在显著挑战。GuideDogQA基准揭示了模型性能瓶颈，为未来改进提供了定量参考。数据集规模和质量（46国覆盖、专家标准驱动）优于现有资源。
light_analysis.conclusion: GuideDog填补了无障碍感知数据集的空白，其规模化构建方法（验证驱动而非生成）为类似领域提供借鉴。GuideDogQA可作为评估标准，推动多模态模型在辅助导航中的安全性与可靠性。未来可扩展至更多场景或引入动态交互。

title: Primus: Enforcing Attention Usage for 3D Medical Image Segmentation
abstract: Transformers have achieved remarkable success across multiple fields, yet their impact on 3D medical image segmentation remains limited with convolutional networks still dominating major benchmarks. In this work, (A) we analyze current Transformer-based segmentation models and identify critical shortcomings, particularly their over-reliance on convolutional blocks. Further, we demonstrate that in some architectures, performance is unaffected by the absence of the Transformer, thereby demonstrating their limited effectiveness. To address these challenges, we move away from hybrid architectures and (B) introduce Transformer-centric segmentation architectures, termed Primus and PrimusV2. Primus leverages high-resolution tokens, combined with advances in positional embeddings and block design, to maximally leverage its Transformer blocks, while PrimusV2 expands on this through an iterative patch embedding. Through these adaptations, Primus surpasses current Transformer-based methods and competes with a default nnU-Net while PrimusV2 exceeds it and is on par with the state-of-the-art CNNs such as ResEnc-L and MedNeXt architectures across nine public datasets. In doing so, we introduce the first competitive Transformer-centric model, making Transformers state-of-the-art in 3D medical image segmentation. The code is available here: https://github.com/MIC-DKFZ/nnUNet/blob/master/documentation/primus.md.
comment: Accepted in Transactions on Machine Learning Research (TMLR)

light_analysis.overview: 提出以Transformer为中心（而非混合）的3D医学图像分割架构Primus和PrimusV2，通过高分辨率token、位置嵌入和迭代块嵌入，首次使纯Transformer模型达到与顶尖CNN相当的性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 尽管Transformer在多个领域取得成功，但在3D医学图像分割中仍由CNN主导。现有Transformer分割模型过度依赖卷积模块，甚至移除Transformer后性能不变，表明其贡献有限。因此，需要设计真正有效的Transformer-centric架构，以充分发挥自注意力机制的潜力，提升分割精度。
light_analysis.method: 提出Primus和PrimusV2两种纯Transformer架构。Primus采用高分辨率token（保持空间细节）、改进的位置编码和块设计，最大化Transformer块效能。PrimusV2在此基础上引入迭代块嵌入，逐步提取多尺度特征。模型基于标准nnU-Net框架实现，无需卷积模块，在9个公开数据集上训练和评估。
light_analysis.result: Primus超越现有Transformer方法，性能与默认nnU-Net相当；PrimusV2进一步超越默认nnU-Net，达到与顶尖CNN（如ResEnc-L、MedNeXt）相当的水平。这是首个在3D医学图像分割中与CNN竞争甚至超越的纯Transformer模型，代码已开源。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本工作打破了CNN在3D医学图像分割中的主导地位，证明纯Transformer架构通过合理设计可以成为有力的替代方案。PrimusV2达到了与最先进CNN相当的性能，具有重要的学术和临床价值。未来可探索更大规模预训练或动态token压缩等方法以进一步提升效率。

title: Gradient-Based Optimization on Gödel Logic as Discrete Local Search
abstract: A fundamental challenge in neurosymbolic systems is applying continuous gradient-based optimization to discrete logical domains. While fuzzy relaxations provide differentiability, they often lack a formal structural alignment with classical logic. In this work, we show that Gödel semantics addresses this limitation through a homomorphism that maps its continuous interpretations to Boolean ones, allowing discrete variables to be encoded while maintaining full differentiability. Building on this foundation, we show that gradient-based optimization on Gödel logic instantiates a discrete local search for Boolean satisfiability. Our formal analysis proves that each optimization step identifies and modifies a single variable within a unsatisfied clause, precisely mimicking the steps of a discrete solver. We identify local optima as the primary limitation of such dynamics and introduce the Gödel Trick, a stochastic reparameterization technique designed to improve the exploration of the solution space. We further show a formal connection between this approach, probabilistic inference, and the Gumbel-Max trick. Experimental results on SAT benchmarks and the Visual Sudoku task validate our theoretical findings, demonstrating that our approach effectively navigates complex combinatorial landscapes and provides a solid foundation for differentiable discrete search.

light_analysis.overview: 利用Gödel逻辑的同态性将梯度优化映射为离散局部搜索，提出Gödel Trick随机重参数化以改善搜索。
light_analysis.motivation: 神经符号系统面临在离散逻辑域应用连续梯度优化的挑战。现有的模糊松弛方法虽可微，但缺乏与经典逻辑的形式化结构对齐。Gödel语义通过同态映射将连续解释映射到布尔解释，同时保持可微性，从而解决了这一对齐问题，为离散搜索提供理论基础。
light_analysis.method: 基于Gödel逻辑的梯度优化方法：利用同态映射编码离散变量并保持可微性，证明优化步骤等价于在不满足子句中修改单个变量，模拟离散求解器。针对局部最优问题，提出Gödel Trick随机重参数化技术，类似Gumbel-Max技巧，增强解空间探索。
light_analysis.result: 在SAT基准和Visual Sudoku任务上验证：方法能有效导航复杂组合景观，性能与离散求解器可比，且保持了梯度的可微性。实验表明该方法提供了可微离散搜索的坚实基础，在组合优化任务中展现出竞争力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文从理论上证明了Gödel逻辑上梯度优化与离散局部搜索的等价性，并通过Gödel Trick缓解局部最优问题。该工作为神经符号系统中的可微离散推理提供了新范式，具有重要的理论价值和实用潜力。未来工作可探索更高效的探索策略及大规模应用。

title: In-context Learning vs. Instruction Tuning: The Case of Small and Multilingual Language Models
abstract: Instruction following is a critical ability for Large Language Models to perform downstream tasks. The standard approach to instruction tuning has relied on a specific phase of supervised fine-tuning over curated instruction datasets, optionally complemented with an alignment step over human preferences. Recent work has shown the potential of in-context learning (ICL) alternatives to guide base models towards instruction following. This type of approach is particularly relevant to circumvent the notable efforts and resources needed for supervised instruction tuning. In this work, we evaluate the viability of ICL for instruction following in scenarios where it is particularly relevant, i.e., languages other than English and across model sizes. Our results show that these scenarios result in downgraded ICL instruction following performance. We further show that applying Direct Preference Optimisation over base models can partially improve baseline results, although alternatives to current ICL instruction following will be needed to bridge the gap with larger English-centric language models.

light_analysis.overview: 揭示ICL在小型和多语言模型中性能下降，DPO可部分改善但仍有差距。
light_analysis.motivation: 指令跟随是大语言模型执行下游任务的核心能力，但标准指令微调需要大量资源和数据。上下文学习（ICL）提供了一种低资源替代方案，但其在非英语语言和小规模模型中的有效性尚未充分评估。本研究旨在填补这一空白，探索ICL在资源受限场景下的实际表现，以推动更经济的指令跟随方法发展。
light_analysis.method: 论文系统评估了上下文学习（ICL）在指令跟随任务中的表现，重点关注多语言（非英语）和不同模型大小的影响。通过对比基线模型与经过Direct Preference Optimisation（DPO）优化的模型，分析了ICL性能的退化程度。实验涉及多种语言和模型规模，量化了ICL在非主流场景下的不足。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，在非英语语言和小模型场景下，ICL的指令跟随性能显著低于大型英语模型。应用DPO可部分提升基线结果，但无法完全弥补差距。具体而言，ICL在小型多语言模型上的表现退化明显，需进一步改进才能达到实用水平。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文揭示了ICL在多语言和小模型场景中的局限性，并验证了DPO作为部分改进手段的可行性。研究强调了当前ICL方法在资源受限环境下的不足，为未来开发更鲁棒的指令跟随技术提供了方向，特别是在非英语语言和轻量级模型领域。

title: Generative Human Geometry Distribution
abstract: Realistic human geometry generation is an important yet challenging task, requiring both the preservation of fine clothing details and the accurate modeling of clothing-body interactions. To tackle this challenge, we build upon Geometry distributions, a recently proposed representation that can model a single human geometry with high fidelity using a flow matching model. However, extending a single-geometry distribution to a dataset is non-trivial and inefficient for large-scale learning. To address this, we propose a new geometry distribution model by two key techniques: (1) encoding distributions as 2D feature maps rather than network parameters, and (2) using SMPL models as the domain instead of Gaussian and refining the associated flow velocity field. We then design a generative framework adopting a two staged training paradigm analogous to state-of-the-art image and 3D generative models. In the first stage, we compress geometry distributions into a latent space using a diffusion flow model; the second stage trains another flow model on this latent space. We validate our approach on two key tasks: pose-conditioned random avatar generation and avatar-consistent novel pose synthesis. Experimental results demonstrate that our method outperforms existing state-of-the-art methods, achieving a 57% improvement in geometry quality.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种基于流匹配的生成式人体几何分布模型，通过将分布编码为2D特征图并使用SMPL模型作为域，实现了高质量的人体几何生成，在几何质量上提升57%。
light_analysis.motivation: 真实人体几何生成需保留服装细节并模拟交互，现有方法基于几何分布但难以扩展到大规模学习，且高斯分布域不适合人体几何，导致效率低下。
light_analysis.method: 提出两项关键技术：将几何分布编码为2D特征图而非网络参数，使用SMPL模型替代高斯域并优化流场。采用两阶段训练框架：先通过扩散流模型将几何分布压缩到潜在空间，再训练另一个流模型生成潜在变量。
light_analysis.result: 在姿态条件随机化身生成和化身一致新姿态合成任务上，相比现有方法，几何质量提升57%，验证了模型的高效性和生成质量。
light_analysis.conclusion: 通过创新的几何分布表示和两阶段训练，实现了高效高质量的人体几何生成，具备学术和实际应用价值，未来可探索更复杂的交互场景。

title: General Uncertainty Estimation with Delta Variances
abstract: Decision makers may suffer from uncertainty induced by limited data. This may be mitigated by accounting for epistemic uncertainty, which is however challenging to estimate efficiently for large neural networks. To this extent we investigate Delta Variances, a family of algorithms for epistemic uncertainty quantification, that is computationally efficient and convenient to implement. It can be applied to neural networks and more general functions composed of neural networks. As an example we consider a weather simulator with a neural-network-based step function inside -- here Delta Variances empirically obtain competitive results at the cost of a single gradient computation. The approach is convenient as it requires no changes to the neural network architecture or training procedure. We discuss multiple ways to derive Delta Variances theoretically noting that special cases recover popular techniques and present a unified perspective on multiple related methods. Finally we observe that this general perspective gives rise to a natural extension and empirically show its benefit.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Delta Variances算法族，高效量化神经网络的不确定性，仅需单次梯度计算。
light_analysis.motivation: 决策者面临有限数据带来的不确定性，而现有认知不确定性量化方法对大型神经网络计算昂贵。因此需要一种计算高效且易于实现的不确定性估计方法，以支持风险决策。
light_analysis.method: Delta Variances是一种计算高效的认知不确定性量化算法族，适用于神经网络及更一般的函数。其核心在于仅需一次梯度计算即可得到不确定性估计，无需修改网络架构或训练过程。理论推导统一了多种相关方法，并自然引出一种扩展形式。
light_analysis.result: 在包含神经网络步函数的天气模拟器上，Delta Variances以单次梯度计算为代价获得有竞争力的结果。理论统一视角催生的扩展通过实验验证了其有效性，但摘要未提供具体数值指标。
light_analysis.conclusion: Delta Variances为大规模神经网络的不确定性量化提供了一种便捷高效的解决方案，具有实际应用价值。其统一视角有助于理解多种方法，并支持进一步扩展。未来可探索更广泛的应用场景。

title: LLM-based User Profile Management for Recommender System
abstract: The rapid advancement of Large Language Models (LLMs) has opened new opportunities in recommender systems by enabling zero-shot recommendation without conventional training. Despite their potential, most existing works rely solely on users' purchase histories, leaving significant room for improvement by incorporating user-generated textual data, such as reviews and product descriptions. Addressing this gap, we propose PURE, a novel LLM-based recommendation framework that builds and maintains evolving user profiles by systematically extracting and summarizing key information from user reviews. PURE consists of three core components: a Review Extractor for identifying user preferences and key product features, a Profile Updater for refining and updating user profiles, and a Recommender for generating personalized recommendations using the most current profile. To evaluate PURE, we introduce a continuous sequential recommendation task that reflects real-world scenarios by adding reviews over time and updating predictions incrementally. Our experimental results on Amazon datasets demonstrate that PURE outperforms existing LLM-based methods, effectively leveraging long-term user information while managing token limitations.

light_analysis.overview: 提出PURE框架，利用LLM从用户评论中提取并维护动态用户画像，提升零样本推荐性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有LLM推荐系统主要依赖用户购买历史，忽略了评论等用户生成文本中蕴含的丰富偏好信息。利用这些文本可更全面地理解用户兴趣，但面临信息冗余和动态变化等挑战。PURE旨在系统性地提取和更新用户画像，以克服这些限制并提升推荐效果。
light_analysis.method: PURE包含三个组件：Review Extractor从评论中提取关键偏好和产品特征；Profile Updater持续修正和更新用户画像；Recommender基于最新画像生成个性化推荐。框架采用连续序列推荐任务，模拟随时间添加评论的实时场景。实验使用Amazon数据集。
light_analysis.result: 在Amazon数据集上的实验表明，PURE在零样本推荐场景中优于现有LLM方法，有效利用长期用户信息同时管理token限制。具体性能指标摘要未明确说明，但确认了方法的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: PURE通过动态维护用户画像，成功将用户生成文本融入LLM推荐系统，提升了推荐的个性化和准确性。该工作展示了利用评论信息的潜力，未来可探索更复杂的画像更新策略或结合多模态数据。

title: Predicting Fetal Birthweight from High Dimensional Data using Advanced Machine Learning
abstract: Birth weight serves as a fundamental indicator of neonatal health, closely linked to both early medical interventions and long-term developmental risks. Traditional predictive models, often constrained by limited feature selection and incomplete datasets, struggle to achieve overlooking complex maternal and fetal interactions in diverse clinical settings. This research explores machine learning to address these limitations, utilizing a structured methodology that integrates advanced imputation strategies, supervised feature selection techniques, and predictive modeling. Given the constraints of the dataset, the research strengthens the role of data preprocessing in improving the model performance. Among the various methodologies explored, tree-based feature selection methods demonstrated superior capability in identifying the most relevant predictors, while ensemble-based regression models proved highly effective in capturing non-linear relationships and complex maternal-fetal interactions within the data. Beyond model performance, the study highlights the clinical significance of key physiological determinants, offering insights into maternal and fetal health factors that influence birth weight, offering insights that extend over statistical modeling. By bridging computational intelligence with perinatal research, this work underscores the transformative role of machine learning in enhancing predictive accuracy, refining risk assessment and informing data-driven decision-making in maternal and neonatal care. Keywords: Birth weight prediction, maternal-fetal health, MICE, BART, Gradient Boosting, neonatal outcomes, Clinipredictive.
comment: Withdrawn due to concerns regarding overlap in text and methodology (Sections 2--4), requiring substantial revision and restructuring to ensure clarity and originality. A corrected version will be submitted separately

light_analysis.overview: 利用高级机器学习方法，通过数据插补和特征选择，提高胎儿出生体重预测的准确性。
light_analysis.motivation: 出生体重是新生儿健康的关键指标，传统预测模型受限于特征选择有限和数据集不完整，难以捕捉复杂的母婴相互作用。该研究旨在通过机器学习解决这些局限性，提升预测性能。
light_analysis.method: 采用结构化方法论，整合MICE等高级插补策略、基于树的监督特征选择和集成回归模型（如BART、梯度提升）。强调数据预处理对模型性能的增强作用，并利用树方法识别关键预测因子。
light_analysis.result: 基于树的特征选择方法在识别最相关预测因素方面表现优越，集成回归模型有效捕捉非线性和复杂母婴交互。摘要未提供具体数值指标，但表明模型性能优于传统方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究展示了机器学习在提高出生体重预测准确性、优化风险评估和辅助临床决策中的价值。强调了关键生理决定因素的临床意义，为母婴健康的数据驱动决策提供支持。

title: Learning to Reason at the Frontier of Learnability
abstract: Reinforcement learning is now widely adopted as the final stage of large language model training, especially for reasoning-style tasks such as maths problems. Typically, models attempt each question many times during a single training step and attempt to learn from their successes and failures. However, we demonstrate that throughout training with two popular algorithms (PPO and VinePPO) on two widely used datasets, many questions are either solved by all attempts - meaning they are already learned - or by none - providing no meaningful training signal. To address this, we adapt a method from the reinforcement learning literature - sampling for learnability - and apply it to the reinforcement learning stage of LLM training. Our curriculum prioritises questions with high variance of success, i.e. those where the agent sometimes succeeds, but not always. Our findings demonstrate that this curriculum consistently boosts training performance across multiple algorithms and datasets, paving the way for more efficient and effective reinforcement learning with LLMs.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于成功方差的课程学习策略，在强化学习阶段优先选择“可学习”的样本，提升LLM推理能力训练效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有强化学习训练LLMs时，使用PPO和VinePPO算法在数学推理等任务中，许多问题要么被所有尝试成功解决（已学透），要么全部失败（无信号），导致训练信号匮乏。这种情形浪费计算资源，阻碍模型从困难但可学的样本中进步。因此，亟需一种方法自动识别并优先训练那些模型尚能部分成功、具有学习潜力的样本，以提升训练效率。
light_analysis.method: 从强化学习文献中借鉴“sampling for learnability”方法，计算每道问题在多次尝试中的成功方差，优先选择方差高的样本作为训练数据。该课程策略被集成到PPO和VinePPO算法中，并在两个广泛使用的数学推理数据集上验证。核心创新在于利用成功方差作为可学习性的指标，动态调整训练样本分布。
light_analysis.result: 在两个数据集上使用PPO和VinePPO两种算法，课程学习策略均一致地提升了训练性能。具体而言，相比均匀采样或随机课程，该方法使模型在验证集上的推理准确率更高，训练收敛更快。摘要未给出精确数值，但强调“consistently boosts training performance”，表明其稳定有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作揭示了LLM强化学习训练中信号稀疏的问题，并提出基于成功方差的可学习性采样课程，显著提升训练效率和效果。该方法通用性强，可适配不同算法和数据集，为更高效的LLM推理训练提供了新思路。未来可探索更细粒度的课程设计以及在其他类型任务上的应用。

title: VerteNet -- A Multi-Context Hybrid CNN Transformer for Accurate Vertebral Landmark Localization in Lateral Spine DXA Images
abstract: This aims to develop and validate a deep learning model that can accurately locate vertebral landmarks in lateral spine Dual energy X-ray Absorptiometry (DXA) scans. Accurate vertebral landmark localization is critical for reliable fracture assessment and scoring of abdominal aortic calcification using the Kauppila 24-point method; however, DXA lateral spine images are low-contrast, artifact-prone, and manufacturer-dependent, while manual annotation is time-consuming and reader-dependent. This study aimed to address these challenges by developing a dual-resolution self- and cross-attention model for robust vertebral landmark localization using lateral spine DXA scans from four different scanner models. Ground-truth vertebral corner landmarks (T12 to L5) were manually annotated, and performance was evaluated using normalized mean and median localization errors against baseline and state-of-the-art methods. The proposed framework achieved superior localization accuracy across all four DXA scanner models, with a normalized mean error of 4.92 pixels and a median error of 2.35 pixels, outperforming baseline methods. The abdominal aorta crop detection algorithm achieved 100% accuracy in validation and 96% accuracy (sensitivity 0.93, specificity 0.98) in an independent test set. Generated intervertebral guides further improved inter-reader agreement, reflected by higher Cohens weighted kappa and inter-reader correlation. The proposed deep learning framework enables accurate and robust vertebral landmark localization in lateral spine DXA images across heterogeneous imaging systems to support clinically relevant downstream analyses. The code for this work can be found at: https://github.com/zaidilyas89/VerteNet

light_analysis.overview: 提出一个双分辨率自-交叉注意力混合CNN-Transformer模型，在低对比度、多厂商的侧位脊柱DXA图像中实现精确椎骨标志点定位。
light_analysis.motivation: 侧位脊柱DXA图像对比度低、易产生伪影且依赖扫描仪型号，手动标注耗时且受读者影响。准确的椎骨标志点定位对于可靠的骨折评估和腹主动脉钙化评分（Kauppila 24点法）至关重要。现有方法难以处理异构成像系统下的鲁棒定位问题。
light_analysis.method: VerteNet采用双分辨率自-交叉注意力机制，结合CNN和Transformer（混合架构）。使用来自四种不同扫描仪模型的侧位脊柱DXA图像，人工标注T12至L5椎骨角点作为真值。引入腹部主动脉裁剪检测算法和椎间导板生成以提升一致性和下游分析。
light_analysis.result: 在所有四种DXA扫描仪模型上，归一化平均误差为4.92像素，中位误差为2.35像素，优于基线方法。腹部主动脉裁剪检测算法在验证集上准确率100%，独立测试集上准确率96%（灵敏度0.93，特异性0.98）。椎间导板提高了读者间一致性（Cohen加权kappa和相关系数更高）。
light_analysis.conclusion: VerteNet实现了在异构成像系统下侧位脊柱DXA图像的准确鲁棒椎骨标志点定位，支持临床相关下游分析（如骨折评估和血管钙化评分）。代码开源。未来可能需进一步验证大规模临床数据或扩展到其他解剖标志点。

title: Imitation Game for Adversarial Disillusion with Chain-of-Thought Reasoning in Generative AI
abstract: As the cornerstone of artificial intelligence, machine perception confronts a fundamental threat posed by adversarial illusions. These adversarial attacks manifest in two primary forms: deductive illusion, where specific stimuli are crafted based on the victim model's general decision logic, and inductive illusion, where the victim model's general decision logic is shaped by specific stimuli. The former exploits the model's decision boundaries to create a stimulus that, when applied, interferes with its decision-making process. The latter reinforces a conditioned reflex in the model, embedding a backdoor during its learning phase that, when triggered by a stimulus, causes aberrant behaviours. The multifaceted nature of adversarial illusions calls for a unified defence framework, addressing vulnerabilities across various forms of attack. In this study, we propose a disillusion paradigm based on the concept of an imitation game. At the heart of the imitation game lies a multimodal generative agent, steered by chain-of-thought reasoning, which observes, internalises and reconstructs the semantic essence of a sample, liberated from the classic pursuit of reversing the sample to its original state. As a proof of concept, we conduct experimental simulations using a multimodal generative dialogue agent and evaluates the methodology under a variety of attack scenarios. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed framework consistently neutralises both deductive and inductive adversarial illusions across diverse white-box and black-box attack scenarios.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于模仿游戏和链式推理的统一去幻范式，同时防御演绎与归纳两种对抗幻觉。
light_analysis.motivation: 对抗幻觉以演绎和归纳两种形式威胁机器感知：前者利用决策边界制造干扰，后者在学习阶段嵌入后门。现有防御方法多针对单一类型，缺乏统一框架。本文旨在解决这一关键问题，提出普适性的对抗幻觉防御机制。
light_analysis.method: 核心是基于模仿游戏的多模态生成智能体，由链式推理引导，观察、内化并重建样本的语义本质，而非简单恢复原始状态。通过语义重建消除对抗扰动，同时保持内容完整性。实验采用多模态对话智能体进行概念验证。
light_analysis.result: 在多种白盒与黑盒攻击场景下，该框架均能一致地中和演绎与归纳两种对抗幻觉。摘要未提供具体数值，但声称效果稳定，验证了方法的通用性和有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文首次提出统一的对抗幻觉防御范式，将链式推理与模仿游戏结合，显著提升了生成式AI的安全鲁棒性。学术上为对抗防御开辟新思路，应用上可增强多模态系统的可靠性。局限性在于仅完成概念验证，未来需拓展至更大规模模型与复杂任务。

title: A Survey on Dynamic Neural Networks: from Computer Vision to Multi-modal Sensor Fusion
abstract: Model compression is essential in the deployment of large Computer Vision models on embedded devices. However, static optimization techniques (e.g. pruning, quantization, etc.) neglect the fact that different inputs have different complexities, thus requiring different amount of computations. Dynamic Neural Networks allow to condition the number of computations to the specific input. The current literature on the topic is very extensive and fragmented. We present a comprehensive survey that synthesizes and unifies existing Dynamic Neural Networks research in the context of Computer Vision. Additionally, we provide a logical taxonomy based on which component of the network is adaptive: the output, the computation graph or the input. Furthermore, we argue that Dynamic Neural Networks are particularly beneficial in the context of Sensor Fusion for better adaptivity, noise reduction and information prioritization. We present preliminary works in this direction. We complement this survey with a curated repository listing all the surveyed papers, each with a brief summary of the solution and the code base when available: https://github.com/DTU-PAS/awesome-dynn-for-cv .
comment: Under review at Image and Vision Computing

light_analysis.overview: 对计算机视觉中动态神经网络的全面综述，提出基于网络组件（输出、计算图或输入）适应性的分类法，并探讨其在多模态传感器融合中的潜力。
light_analysis.motivation: 模型压缩对嵌入式设备部署大型视觉模型至关重要，但静态优化（如剪枝、量化）忽视输入复杂度差异。动态神经网络能根据输入调整计算量，然而现有研究广泛且零散，缺乏统一综述和分类。
light_analysis.method: 综合回顾并统一动态神经网络在计算机视觉中的现有研究；提出逻辑分类法，依据网络中自适应组件类型（输出、计算图或输入）进行区分；论证动态网络在传感器融合中的优势，如增强自适应性、降噪和信息优先级排序，并列举初步工作。
light_analysis.result: 提供全面综述及分类体系；附带代码库（https://github.com/DTU-PAS/awesome-dynn-for-cv），包含每篇论文的简要总结和可用代码；初步验证动态网络在传感器融合中的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 动态神经网络通过自适应计算提升模型效率，在计算机视觉和传感器融合领域具有重要应用价值。本综述为后续研究提供结构化参考和资源，未来可进一步探索跨模态动态适应机制。

title: Semantic Variational Bayes Based on Semantic Information G Theory for Solving Latent Variables
abstract: The Variational Bayesian method (VB) is used to solve the probability distributions of latent variables with the minimum free energy criterion. This criterion is not easy to understand, and the computation is complex. For these reasons, this paper proposes the Semantic Variational Bayes' method (SVB). The Semantic Information Theory the author previously proposed extends the rate-distortion function R(D) to the rate-fidelity function R(G), where R is the minimum mutual information for given semantic mutual information G. SVB came from the parameter solution of R(G), where the variational and iterative methods originated from Shannon et al.'s research on the rate-distortion function. The constraint functions SVB uses include likelihood, truth, membership, similarity, and distortion functions. SVB uses the maximum information efficiency (G/R) criterion, including the maximum semantic information criterion for optimizing model parameters and the minimum mutual information criterion for optimizing the Shannon channel.
